message:
feat(jfp): Add completion, doctor, and open commands

Extends jfp CLI with three new commands:

- completion: Shell completion script generation
- doctor: System health check and diagnostics
- open: Open prompt in browser/default handler

Also adds clap CommandFactory import for completion generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,6 +57,7 @@ This is the root cause of repeated “catastrophically broken CSS” incidents.
 ### Workflow Note (This Repo)
 `.github/workflows/sync-vercel-aliases.yml` is **disabled** here by design.  
 Alias syncing now lives in the premium repo to prevent domain fights.
+The premium repo workflow also verifies pro-domain CSS chunks and re-aliases if any are missing.
 
 ### Manual Verification Checklist (Free Site Only)
 After any deployment of this repo:

@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/jeffreysprompts.com"
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # CLI framework
 clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive", "env", "string"] }
+clap_complete = "4"
 
 # Async runtime
 tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }

@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 [dependencies]
 # CLI framework
 clap.workspace = true
+clap_complete.workspace = true
 
 # Async runtime
 tokio.workspace = true
